title: Device Home Screen - No device connected - Closing Supported devices list
scenario: Navigating from Home screen "Supported Devices" link to device list and back via back arrow returns user to Home screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Observe the Home screen with no device connected.
3. Tap the 'Supported Devices' link displayed on the Home screen.
4. Observe the list of supported devices with images.
6. Verify it links to Poly support.
7. Navigate back using the back arrow ('<') button.
expected: Tapping the 'Supported Devices' link displays a list of supported devices with images and an 'Other devices' button linking to Poly support. Tapping the back arrow ('<') returns the user to the Home screen.
